flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Central Pennsylvania Institute of Science and Technology rose 47% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.4k → $9.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Central Pennsylvania Institute of Science and Technology rose 138% between 2006 and 2009 (69 → 164).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Pennsylvania Institute of Science and Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Central Pennsylvania Institute of Science and Technology rose 21% between 2006 and 2009 (80.0% → 96.5%).
